description: Enable the Investments module in Manager.io and record a new investment purchase. Create a new investment named 'Northwind Strategic Fund' (Code: NSF). Record a payment from 'Cash on Hand' dated 2025-08-15 for 100 units of 'Northwind Strategic Fund' at a unit price of 45.00 (Total: 4,500.00), ensuring the payment is allocated to the corresponding investment account.
